text:
Market today: Geopolitical tension is the main driver, pushing oil up and creating a nervous mood that can hit tech hard. 

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL at -37.71% and SPAL is a SELL at -48.51%. Both are leveraged ETFs and are hurting badly, amplified by margin. 

Watch: Keep an eye on NVDA and AMD, as they are showing up on the scanner with decent setups, even though they are currently down in your book.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged losers and watching for any signs of a broader tech rebound.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming or exiting this leveraged position given the -37.71% PnL and inherent decay.
SPAL: Same as SOXL, consider trimming or exiting this leveraged position at -48.51% PnL.
No new buys today - hold and watch
